description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Heel: 2" Product Description Black square-toed sling backs with criss-crossing overlays at the toe, elastication at the sling back detail Plaid inner lining and a patch on the footbed TPU outsole with a kitten heel and grooves on the heel patch Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
